name: tsundoku
description: Turn owned-but-unread Kobo e-books into actionable skills (Claude Code CLI only).

interface.shortDescription: Turn owned-but-unread e-books into actionable skills
interface.longDescription: Clear the tsundoku pile by mining the books you already own for usable knowledge: authenticate to Kobo and search your library, download chosen titles as DRM-free EPUBs, convert them to chapter-chunked Markdown, then distill each book's frameworks, principles, and decision rules into atomic, reusable agent skills. Use it to convert a stack of unread books into capabilities an agent can actually invoke.
defaultPrompt: Search my Kobo library and download this book.
Convert this EPUB into chapter-chunked Markdown.
Distill this book into a set of agent skills.
